meta.title: Listening dialogs (Level 1)
meta.note: Two-speaker dialogs constrained to Pimsleur Level 1 vocab (~30s–2min). Audio via scripts/build-listening-dialogs.mjs on Cloudinary.

dialogs.title: Meeting someone
dialogs.situation: Two people meet and introduce themselves.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Hello. How are you?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Fine, thanks. And you?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Very well. My name is María.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Pleased to meet you. My name is Carlos.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Are you American?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes, I'm American. And you?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: I'm Mexican. I speak Spanish.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: I speak a little Spanish.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Do you understand?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Sí, entiendo. Habla usted despacio, por favor.
lines.en: Yes, I understand. Please speak slowly.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Agreed. Nice to meet you.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Nice to meet you too. Goodbye.

dialogs.title: Ordering a drink
dialogs.situation: Ordering something to drink at a cafe.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Good afternoon. What do you want to drink?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: I want to drink something. Is there tea?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Sí, hay té. ¿Quiere una taza de té?
lines.en: Yes, there is tea. Do you want a cup of tea?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Sí, por favor. Y quiero un vaso de agua también.
lines.en: Yes, please. And I want a glass of water too.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Do you want milk with the tea?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: No, gracias. Prefiero el té sólo.
lines.en: No, thanks. I prefer the tea alone.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Very well. Do you want anything else?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: No, nothing more. How much does it cost?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: It costs five pesos.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Agreed. I can pay now.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Excellent. Thank you.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Thank you very much. Goodbye.

dialogs.title: Asking directions
dialogs.situation: Finding a hotel and a restaurant nearby.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Excuse me, miss. Where is the hotel?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: The hotel is over there. Do you see it?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: No, I don't see it. Is it nearby?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Sí, está cerca. Puede ir a la derecha.
lines.en: Yes, it's nearby. You can go to the right.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: To the right, and then?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Luego, puede ir derecho dos cuadras.
lines.en: Then you can go straight two blocks.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: And the restaurant? Is it far?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: No, no está lejos. Está a la izquierda del hotel.
lines.en: No, it's not far. It's to the left of the hotel.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Can I go now?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Sí, puede ir ahora. No es tarde.
lines.en: Yes, you can go now. It isn't late.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Very well. Thank you very much.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Agreed. Goodbye.

dialogs.title: Evening plans
dialogs.situation: Friends decide what to do this evening.

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Hola, Carlos. ¿Qué quiere hacer esta noche?
lines.en: Hi, Carlos. What do you want to do tonight?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: I don't know. Do you want to go to the movies?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Sí, me gusta. ¿Hay una película buena?
lines.en: Yes, I like that. Is there a good movie?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. Or do you prefer to go to the theater?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: I prefer the movies. Shall we go together?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes, let's go. At what time?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: At eight. Is that early?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: No, está bien. ¿Quiere comer algo ahora?
lines.en: No, that's fine. Do you want to eat something now?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Sí. Quiero comer en un restaurante cerca.
lines.en: Yes. I want to eat at a nearby restaurant.

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: De acuerdo. Nos vemos a las siete.
lines.en: Agreed. See you at seven.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Excellent. See you later.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: See you later. Goodbye.

dialogs.title: Shopping
dialogs.situation: Buying a few things and asking prices.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Good morning. I want to buy something.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Good morning. What do you want to buy?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Quiero comprar algo. ¿Hay una panadería cerca?
lines.en: I want to buy something. Is there a bakery nearby?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes, it's here. Do you want anything else?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Sí. Quiero comprar un refresco también.
lines.en: Yes. I want to buy a soda too.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Very well. How many sodas do you want?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Two, please. How much do they cost?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: They cost twenty pesos.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Twenty pesos. Can I pay now?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes, you can pay here.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Excellent. Thank you very much.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Agreed. Goodbye.

dialogs.title: A phone call
dialogs.situation: Calling a friend to see how they are.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Hello? Carlos?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes, I'm Carlos. Who is it?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: I'm María. How are you?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Fine, thanks. And you?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Very well. Can you talk now?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Sí, puedo. Un momento, por favor.
lines.en: Yes, I can. One moment, please.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Agreed. Do you want to talk later?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: No, está bien. Podemos hablar ahora.
lines.en: No, it's fine. We can talk now.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Excellent. What do you want to do today?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: No sé. ¿Quiere venir a mi casa?
lines.en: I don't know. Do you want to come to my house?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Sí, me gusta. Nos vemos más tarde.
lines.en: Yes, I like that. See you later.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Agreed. See you later. Goodbye.

dialogs.title: At the hotel
dialogs.situation: Checking in and asking about the room.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Good afternoon. I want a hotel.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Good afternoon. Do you want to stay here?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Sí, por favor. ¿Hay un lugar aquí?
lines.en: Yes, please. Is there a place here?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes, there is. For how long?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: For one week. How much does it cost?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: It costs one hundred pesos per day.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: One hundred pesos. Can I pay now?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes, you can pay here.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Very well. Where is my place?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Está a la derecha. Puede ir allí ahora.
lines.en: It's to the right. You can go there now.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Is there a bathroom?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes, the bathroom is nearby.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Excellent. Thank you very much.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: You're welcome. Goodbye.

dialogs.title: What time is it?
dialogs.situation: Asking the time and making plans.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Excuse me. What time is it?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Son las tres de la tarde.
lines.en: It's three in the afternoon.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Three? Is it late?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: No, it isn't late. Why?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Quiero ir al cine. ¿A qué hora?
lines.en: I want to go to the movies. At what time?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: At eight. Is that early?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: No, that's fine. Do you want to go with me?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. Shall we go together?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes, let's go. Do you want to eat something now?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. I want to drink some tea.

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: De acuerdo. Hay un restaurante cerca.
lines.en: Agreed. There's a restaurant nearby.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Is it far?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: No, está aquí. Podemos ir ahora.
lines.en: No, it's here. We can go now.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Excellent. Let's go.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: See you later.

dialogs.title: Feeling sick
dialogs.situation: A friend is sick and needs help.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Hi, Carlos. How are you?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: I'm not well. I'm sick.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: You're sick? What do you need?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: I need a doctor. Can you help me?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes, I can help you. Do you want to go now?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Sí, por favor. ¿Dónde está el médico?
lines.en: Yes, please. Where is the doctor?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Está cerca. Podemos ir a la derecha.
lines.en: It's nearby. We can go to the right.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Is it far?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: No, no está lejos. Dos cuadras.
lines.en: No, it isn't far. Two blocks.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Very well. Can I drink something?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes. Do you want a glass of water?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes, I want water. Thanks.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Agreed. Let's go together.

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Muchas gracias. Usted es una buena persona.
lines.en: Thank you very much. You are a good person.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: It's nothing. Let's go.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Agreed. Goodbye… no, let's go.

dialogs.title: Taking a taxi
dialogs.situation: Getting a taxi to a restaurant.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Excuse me. Can you help me?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes. What do you want?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Quiero ir al restaurante. ¿Puedo ir con usted?
lines.en: I want to go to the restaurant. Can I go with you?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes. Where is the restaurant?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: It's on that avenue. Do you know it?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes, I know it. It's far, right?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes, it's far. How much does it cost?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: It costs fifty pesos.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Agreed. We can go now.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes. Let's go. Do you want to go straight?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Sí, derecho. Luego a la izquierda.
lines.en: Yes, straight. Then to the left.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: To the left. And then?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Luego, tres cuadras. El restaurante está allí.
lines.en: Then, three blocks. The restaurant is there.

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Muy bien. ¿Quiere pagar ahora o más tarde?
lines.en: Very well. Do you want to pay now or later?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: I can pay now. Here you go.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Thank you. We're here.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Excellent. Thank you very much. Goodbye.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: You're welcome. Goodbye.

dialogs.title: At a restaurant
dialogs.situation: Ordering food and drinks for lunch.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Good afternoon. What do you want to eat?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: I want to eat something. What is there?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: There is mole. Do you like mole?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Sí, me gusta. Quiero mole, por favor.
lines.en: Yes, I like it. I want mole, please.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Very well. Do you want to drink something?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. I want a beer. Is there beer?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes, there is. Do you want a large beer?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: No, pequeña, por favor. Y un vaso de agua.
lines.en: No, small, please. And a glass of water.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Agreed. Do you want anything else?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: No, nothing more. How much does it cost?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: It costs forty pesos.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: That's fine. I can pay afterward.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes. Do you want to eat now?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. I want to eat. Can I eat here?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Of course. You can eat here.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Excellent. Thank you very much.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: You're welcome. Do you want to talk a little?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Sí. Hablo un poco de español.
lines.en: Yes. I speak a little Spanish.

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Muy bien. Habla usted despacio, y yo entiendo.
lines.en: Very well. Speak slowly, and I understand.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Agreed. Thank you.

dialogs.title: Talking about family
dialogs.situation: Friends talk about parents and home.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Carlos, where do you live?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: I live here. And you?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: I live nearby. Do you live with your family?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Sí. Vivo con mi padre y mi madre.
lines.en: Yes. I live with my father and my mother.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: How is your mother?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: She's well. And your father?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Mi padre está bien también. ¿Tiene amigos aquí?
lines.en: My father is well too. Do you have friends here?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. I have a friend. And you?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Tengo una amiga. Vive en los Estados Unidos.
lines.en: I have a friend. She lives in the United States.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Does she speak English?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes, she speaks English and Spanish.

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Excelente. Yo hablo un poco de inglés.
lines.en: Excellent. I speak a little English.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Do you want to learn more?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. I want to study. Can you help me?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes, I can. We can talk together.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: When? Today?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Not today. Tomorrow. At what time?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: At ten. Is that early?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: No, está bien. Nos vemos mañana.
lines.en: No, that's fine. See you tomorrow.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Agreed. See you tomorrow. Goodbye.

dialogs.title: Learning Spanish
dialogs.situation: Practicing Spanish and asking what words mean.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: María, I want to learn Spanish.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Very well. Do you speak Spanish?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Hablo un poco. No entiendo mucho.
lines.en: I speak a little. I don't understand much.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Agreed. I'll speak slowly. Do you understand?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes, I understand. What does that word mean?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Which one? This one?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes, that one. What does it mean?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: It means “friend.” Do you know it?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes, I know. I have friends here.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Excellent. Do you want to study more?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. Can I write the words?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes. Write them, please.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Agreed. Can you say it again?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Of course. “I want to learn Spanish.”

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: I want to learn Spanish. Is that okay?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Sí, está muy bien. Habla usted bien.
lines.en: Yes, that's very good. You speak well.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Thanks. Can we talk tomorrow too?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Sí. Mañana a las once. ¿Le gusta?
lines.en: Yes. Tomorrow at eleven. Do you like that?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: I like it. See you tomorrow.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: See you tomorrow. Goodbye.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Goodbye. Thank you very much.

dialogs.title: Plans for tomorrow
dialogs.situation: Deciding what to do tomorrow.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Hi. What do you want to do tomorrow?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: I don't know. Do you want to go to the movies?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes. Or to the theater?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Prefiero el cine. ¿Hay una película buena?
lines.en: I prefer the movies. Is there a good movie?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Sí. Hay una película a las siete.
lines.en: Yes. There's a movie at seven.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: At seven? Is that early or late?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: It isn't late. It's fine.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Agreed. Do you want to eat beforehand?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Sí. Quiero comer en un restaurante cerca.
lines.en: Yes. I want to eat at a nearby restaurant.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Where is the restaurant?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Está a la izquierda del cine. ¿Lo ve?
lines.en: It's to the left of the movie theater. Do you see it?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes, I see it. Shall we go together?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes, let's go. Do you want to talk with someone?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Sí. Quiero hablar con un amigo.
lines.en: Yes. I want to talk with a friend.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Excellent. Can he come?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Creo que sí. Puedo hablar por teléfono.
lines.en: I think so. I can talk on the phone.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Very well. Talk to him now.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Agreed. One moment.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: What does he say?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: He says yes. He can come.

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Excelente. Nos vemos a las seis.
lines.en: Excellent. See you at six.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: At six. See you later.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: See you later. Goodbye.

dialogs.title: Looking for help
dialogs.situation: Someone needs help finding a person and a place.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Excuse me, miss. Can you help me?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes. What do you need?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: I'm looking for a person. Do you know her?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Who? What's her name?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Se llama Ana. Es una amiga.
lines.en: Her name is Ana. She's a friend.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes, I know her. She lives nearby.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Where does she live?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: She lives on that street. Do you see it?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: No, I don't see it. Is it far?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: No. Puede ir derecho dos cuadras.
lines.en: No. You can go straight two blocks.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Straight two blocks. And then?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Luego a la derecha. Su casa está allí.
lines.en: Then to the right. Her house is there.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Can I go now?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Sí. Pero ella no está en casa ahora.
lines.en: Yes. But she isn't at home now.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Where is she?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: She's at the restaurant. Do you want to go?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. Can you come with me?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes, I can. Let's go together.

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Muchas gracias. Usted es una buena persona.
lines.en: Thank you very much. You are a good person.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: You're welcome. Do you speak Spanish well?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: I speak a little. I'm still learning.

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Está bien. Habla despacio, y yo entiendo.
lines.en: That's fine. Speak slowly, and I understand.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Agreed. Let's go.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes. The restaurant is here.

dialogs.title: At the market
dialogs.situation: Buying food and asking prices at a market.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Good morning. What do you want to buy?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Buenos días. Quiero comprar algo. ¿Hay una panadería?
lines.en: Good morning. I want to buy something. Is there a bakery?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Sí. La panadería está aquí. ¿Quiere algo?
lines.en: Yes. The bakery is here. Do you want something?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes, please. How much does it cost?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: It costs ten pesos.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Ten pesos. I want two. How much do they cost?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: They cost twenty pesos.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Agreed. Is there milk too?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes, there is milk. Do you want one?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. And sodas?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes. How many sodas do you want?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Three, please. How much do they cost?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: The sodas cost fifteen pesos.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Very well. Can I pay for everything now?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Sí. Son cuarenta y cinco pesos.
lines.en: Yes. That's forty-five pesos.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Here you go. Is that enough?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes, that's enough. Thank you.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Do you want anything else?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes. I want something else.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: I want tea. Is there tea here?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Sí. Una taza de té cuesta cinco pesos.
lines.en: Yes. A cup of tea costs five pesos.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Excellent. I want tea too.

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: De acuerdo. Cincuenta pesos en total.
lines.en: Agreed. Fifty pesos in total.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Agreed. Thank you very much. Goodbye.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: You're welcome. Goodbye.

dialogs.title: Visiting a friend
dialogs.situation: Arriving at a friend's house for a visit.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Hi, María. Are you home?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes. Good morning. How are you?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Fine, thanks. And you?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Very well. Do you want to drink something?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Sí. Quiero un vaso de agua, por favor.
lines.en: Yes. I want a glass of water, please.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Here you go. Do you want tea too?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: No, gracias. El agua está bien.
lines.en: No, thanks. The water is fine.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Agreed. Do you want to sit down?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Sí. Su casa es muy buena.
lines.en: Yes. Your house is very nice.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Thank you. Do you live nearby?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes, I live nearby. Three blocks.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Excellent. We can see each other more.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. What do you want to do today?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: I want to talk. Do you speak English?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: I speak a little. I prefer Spanish.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Me too. We can speak Spanish.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Do you want to go to the movies later?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes, I like that. At what time?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: At eight. Can you?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes, I can. Do you want to eat beforehand?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Sí. Hay un restaurante cerca de aquí.
lines.en: Yes. There's a restaurant near here.

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Excelente. Nos vemos a las siete.
lines.en: Excellent. See you at seven.

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: A las siete. Muchas gracias por el agua.
lines.en: At seven. Thank you very much for the water.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: You're welcome. See you later.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: See you later. Goodbye.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Goodbye.

dialogs.title: Travel plans
dialogs.situation: Planning a short vacation trip.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Carlos, do you want to go on vacation?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. Where do you want to go?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: I want to go to Mexico. Do you like that?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes, I like it. When?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Next week. Can you?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: I think so. For how long?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: For one week. Is that enough?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. Where are we going to stay?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: En un hotel. ¿Quiere un hotel grande?
lines.en: In a hotel. Do you want a large hotel?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: No. Prefiero un hotel pequeño cerca.
lines.en: No. I prefer a small hotel nearby.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Agreed. How much does it cost?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: I don't know. Can you find out?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes. I can talk on the phone.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Excellent. What do you want to do there?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Quiero comer, hablar español, y ver a la gente.
lines.en: I want to eat, speak Spanish, and see people.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Me too. Are there good restaurants?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Sí. Y hay un cine y un teatro.
lines.en: Yes. And there's a movie theater and a theater.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Excellent. Do we need a lot of money?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Un poco. Cien dólares es suficiente, creo.
lines.en: A little. One hundred dollars is enough, I think.

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: De acuerdo. Yo puedo pagar mi hotel.
lines.en: Agreed. I can pay for my hotel.

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Y yo puedo pagar el mío. ¿Vamos juntos?
lines.en: And I can pay for mine. Shall we go together?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes, let's go together. I like that.

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Nos vemos mañana para hablar más.
lines.en: See you tomorrow to talk more.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. Tomorrow at eleven.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: At eleven. See you tomorrow.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: See you tomorrow. Goodbye.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Goodbye.

dialogs.title: Morning chat
dialogs.situation: A longer morning conversation about the day ahead.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Good morning, Carlos.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Good morning, María. How are you?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Very well. And you?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Fine, thanks. What time is it?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: It's nine. Is that early?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: A little. What do you want to do today?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: I want to study Spanish. Do you want to study with me?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. Where?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: At my house. Can you come?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. At what time?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: At eleven. Is that fine?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. Do you want to have tea beforehand?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: I prefer tea. Is there a place nearby?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Sí. Hay un restaurante a dos cuadras.
lines.en: Yes. There's a restaurant two blocks away.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Excellent. Shall we go now?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Sí, vamos. ¿Quiere ir a la derecha o a la izquierda?
lines.en: Yes, let's go. Do you want to go right or left?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: To the right. Then straight.

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: De acuerdo. ¿Habla usted con mucha gente aquí?
lines.en: Agreed. Do you talk with a lot of people here?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes. I like to talk. And you?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Yo también. Todavía aprendo, pero puedo hablar.
lines.en: Me too. I'm still learning, but I can talk.

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Habla usted bien. ¿Entiende cuando hablo rápido?
lines.en: You speak well. Do you understand when I speak fast?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: No siempre. Hable más despacio, por favor.
lines.en: Not always. Please speak more slowly.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Agreed. I'll speak slowly.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Thanks. Do you want to eat after studying?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes. I want to eat mole. Do you like it?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Sí, me gusta mucho. Vamos juntos.
lines.en: Yes, I like it a lot. Let's go together.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Excellent. Here's the restaurant.

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Muy bien. Tomamos un té, y luego estudiamos.
lines.en: Very well. We'll have tea, and then we study.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes. I like that plan.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Me too. Thank you.

dialogs.title: Money and paying
dialogs.situation: Talking about prices, dollars, and pesos.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Excuse me. How much does this cost?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: It costs thirty pesos.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Thirty pesos? Can I pay with dollars?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Sí. Un dólar es suficiente, creo.
lines.en: Yes. One dollar is enough, I think.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: One dollar? Is that enough?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Sí. O puede pagar veinte pesos.
lines.en: Yes. Or you can pay twenty pesos.

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Prefiero pagar con pesos. Aquí tiene.
lines.en: I prefer to pay with pesos. Here you go.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Thank you. Do you want anything else?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. I want a soda. How much does it cost?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Five pesos.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Agreed. Can I pay for everything now?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Sí. Son treinta y cinco pesos.
lines.en: Yes. That's thirty-five pesos.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Here's forty. Is that okay?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes. Here's five pesos.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Thank you very much. Goodbye.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: You're welcome. Goodbye.

dialogs.title: Going for a walk
dialogs.situation: Friends decide to walk around town.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Hi. Do you want to go with me?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Where to?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Quiero ir por aquí. ¿Quiere ir conmigo?
lines.en: I want to go around here. Do you want to go with me?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. Is it far?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: No. Podemos ir derecho, luego a la izquierda.
lines.en: No. We can go straight, then left.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Agreed. What's over there?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Hay una avenida grande. Y hay gente.
lines.en: There's a big avenue. And there are people.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Do you want to drink something afterward?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes. I prefer tea. And you?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: I want a soda.

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Muy bien. Hay un lugar cerca del cine.
lines.en: Very well. There's a place near the movie theater.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Is the movie theater here?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Sí, lo ve. Está a la derecha.
lines.en: Yes, you see it. It's to the right.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Ah, yes. I see it. Let's go.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Do you want to go fast or slowly?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Slowly. It isn't late.

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Excelente. Me gusta ir con usted.
lines.en: Excellent. I like going with you.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Me too. Thank you.

dialogs.title: Getting detailed directions
dialogs.situation: A longer exchange finding several places in town.

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Disculpe. ¿Puede ayudarme? No sé dónde estoy.
lines.en: Excuse me. Can you help me? I don't know where I am.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes. Where do you want to go?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: I want to go to the hotel. Where is it?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: El hotel está lejos. ¿Quiere ir ahora?
lines.en: The hotel is far. Do you want to go now?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. How can I go?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Puede ir a la derecha dos cuadras.
lines.en: You can go right two blocks.

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: A la derecha dos cuadras. ¿Y luego?
lines.en: Right two blocks. And then?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Then straight three blocks. Do you understand?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. And after that?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Después, a la izquierda. El hotel está allí.
lines.en: After that, to the left. The hotel is there.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Can I see the hotel from here?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: No. No lo ve. Está lejos.
lines.en: No. You don't see it. It's far.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Agreed. And the restaurant?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: El restaurante está cerca del hotel.
lines.en: The restaurant is near the hotel.

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: ¿A la izquierda o a la derecha del hotel?
lines.en: To the left or the right of the hotel?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: To the left. Do you want to eat there?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. Is there a bakery too?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Sí. La panadería está en esa avenida.
lines.en: Yes. The bakery is on that avenue.

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: ¿Puedo ir a la panadería antes del hotel?
lines.en: Can I go to the bakery before the hotel?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Sí. Vaya derecho una cuadra. Luego a la derecha.
lines.en: Yes. Go straight one block. Then right.

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Una cuadra, luego a la derecha. ¿Es cerca?
lines.en: One block, then right. Is it nearby?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Sí, está cerca. Puede ir ahora.
lines.en: Yes, it's nearby. You can go now.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: And the bathroom? Where is a bathroom?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Hay un baño en el restaurante. Está bien.
lines.en: There's a bathroom in the restaurant. It's fine.

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Muchas gracias. Usted me ayuda mucho.
lines.en: Thank you very much. You help me a lot.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: You're welcome. Do you speak Spanish well?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Hablo un poco. Todavía no entiendo todo.
lines.en: I speak a little. I still don't understand everything.

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Está bien. Puede preguntar otra vez.
lines.en: That's fine. You can ask again.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Can I ask again later?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Of course. I'm here.

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Excelente. Voy al hotel ahora. Adiós.
lines.en: Excellent. I'm going to the hotel now. Goodbye.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Goodbye. See you later.

dialogs.title: Dinner invitation
dialogs.situation: Inviting a friend to dinner and planning the evening.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Carlos, do you want to eat with me tonight?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. Where?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: At my house. Do you like that?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes, I like it. At what time?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: At seven. Is that early?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: No, está bien. ¿Qué vamos a comer?
lines.en: No, that's fine. What are we going to eat?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Quiero hacer mole. ¿Le gusta el mole?
lines.en: I want to make mole. Do you like mole?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes, a lot. Can I help?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Sí. ¿Puede comprar algo en la panadería?
lines.en: Yes. Can you buy something at the bakery?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. Where is the bakery?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Está cerca. Dos cuadras a la derecha.
lines.en: It's nearby. Two blocks to the right.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Agreed. Do you want milk too?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Sí, por favor. Y un refresco.
lines.en: Yes, please. And a soda.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: How much does everything cost?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Creo que cuesta veinte pesos. ¿Es suficiente?
lines.en: I think it costs twenty pesos. Is that enough?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. I can pay.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Thank you. Do you want to talk with someone else?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Sí. Quiero hablar con un amigo. ¿Puede?
lines.en: Yes. I want to talk with a friend. Is that okay?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Of course. Does he speak Spanish?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: He speaks a little. Like me.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: That's fine. We can speak slowly.

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Excelente. ¿Quiere que venga a las seis?
lines.en: Excellent. Do you want him to come at six?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Sí. A las seis. Podemos tomar algo antes.
lines.en: Yes. At six. We can drink something beforehand.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Tea or beer?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: I prefer tea. And you?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: I want a beer. Is there beer?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Sí, hay. Nos vemos a las seis.
lines.en: Yes, there is. See you at six.

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: De acuerdo. Voy a la panadería ahora.
lines.en: Agreed. I'm going to the bakery now.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Very well. See you later.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: See you later. Goodbye.

dialogs.title: Buying several things
dialogs.situation: Shopping for a few different items and comparing prices.

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Buenas tardes. Quiero comprar algunas cosas.
lines.en: Good afternoon. I want to buy a few things.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Good afternoon. What do you want?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: I want something small. Is there something here?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes. Do you want this?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. How much does it cost?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: It costs twenty pesos.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Is there something smaller?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes. This costs fifteen pesos.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: I prefer this. Can I buy it?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes. Do you want anything else?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Sí. Quiero un refresco y un té.
lines.en: Yes. I want a soda and a tea.

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: El refresco cuesta cinco. El té cuesta cinco también.
lines.en: The soda costs five. The tea costs five too.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Ten pesos. And this?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Quince. En total, treinta y cinco pesos.
lines.en: Fifteen. In total, thirty-five pesos.

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: De acuerdo. ¿Puedo pagar con un dólar?
lines.en: Agreed. Can I pay with a dollar?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes. One dollar is enough.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Excellent. Can you help me with the things?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Sí. ¿Quiere ir a su hotel ahora?
lines.en: Yes. Do you want to go to your hotel now?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. Is it far?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: No. Está a la izquierda. Tres cuadras.
lines.en: No. It's to the left. Three blocks.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: I can go. Thank you very much.

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: De nada. ¿Quiere venir mañana otra vez?
lines.en: You're welcome. Do you want to come again tomorrow?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Sí. Mañana a las diez. ¿Está bien?
lines.en: Yes. Tomorrow at ten. Is that fine?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes. See you tomorrow.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: See you tomorrow. Goodbye.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Goodbye.

dialogs.title: Friends catch up
dialogs.situation: A longer conversation between friends about life, plans, and language.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Hi, Carlos. How are you?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Fine, María. And you?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Very well. It's been a long time.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. Where have you been?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: He estado en los Estados Unidos. ¿Y usted?
lines.en: I've been in the United States. And you?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: I'm here. I still live nearby.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: How is your family?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Mi padre y mi madre están bien. ¿Y la suya?
lines.en: My father and mother are well. And yours?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: También están bien. Mi amiga vive en los Estados Unidos.
lines.en: They're well too. My friend lives in the United States.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Does she speak English there?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes. She speaks English and Spanish.

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Yo quiero aprender más inglés. ¿Puede ayudarme?
lines.en: I want to learn more English. Can you help me?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Sí. Y usted puede ayudarme con el español.
lines.en: Yes. And you can help me with Spanish.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Agreed. What do you want to do today?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Quiero tomar algo y hablar. ¿Hay un lugar cerca?
lines.en: I want to drink something and talk. Is there a place nearby?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Sí. Hay un restaurante a la derecha.
lines.en: Yes. There's a restaurant to the right.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Do you want to go now?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. Do you want tea or a soda?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: I want tea. And you?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Yo quiero una cerveza. ¿Le gusta la cerveza?
lines.en: I want a beer. Do you like beer?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: A little. I prefer tea.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: That's fine. Do you want to eat too?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Later. Right now I want to talk.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: What do you want to tell me?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Quiero ir al cine esta noche. ¿Quiere venir?
lines.en: I want to go to the movies tonight. Do you want to come?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes. At what time?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: At eight. Is that late?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: No. Is there a good movie?

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: Yes. I think so. Shall we go together?

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Yes, let's go. Do you want to talk with someone?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Sí. Puedo llamar a una amiga por teléfono.
lines.en: Yes. I can call a friend on the phone.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Excellent. Can she come?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Creo que sí. Hablo con ella ahora.
lines.en: I think so. I'll talk with her now.

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: De acuerdo. Yo puedo pagar las cosas del cine.
lines.en: Agreed. I can pay for the movie things.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: No. We can pay together. Is that okay?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Sí. Me gusta. ¿Nos vemos a las siete?
lines.en: Yes. I like that. See you at seven?

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: A las siete cerca del cine. ¿Lo conoce?
lines.en: At seven near the movie theater. Do you know it?

lines.speaker: b
lines.es: Sí, lo conozco. Está en esa avenida.
lines.en: Yes, I know it. It's on that avenue.

lines.speaker: a
lines.es: Excelente. Me gusta verlo otra vez.
lines.en: Excellent. I like seeing you again.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Me too. See you later.

lines.speaker: a
lines.en: See you later. Goodbye.

lines.speaker: b
lines.en: Goodbye, María.
